text: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ وَیْلٌ لِکُلِّ هُمَزَهٍ فِی فَرَائِضِهِ أَبْعَدَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ الْفَقْرَ وَ جَلَبَ عَلَیْهِ الرِّزْقَ وَ یَدْفَعُ عَنْهُ مِیتَهَ السَّوْءِ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. And from the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever recites ‘Wailul Lekulle Humazah’ (Surah Humazah) in his obligatory prayers, Allah would remove poverty and destitution from him and make livelihood easy for him and also keep him safe from accidental or bad death.
